# DripStix

> DripStix is a Kenyan online store selling premium phone and laptop stickers. Customers browse trendy designs, customize their picks, and pay securely with M-PESA via Payflow.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand overview, featured drops, and current offers.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse all phone and laptop stickers by category.
- [Affiliate Program](/affiliate): Earn 20% commission by sharing DripStix posters.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and location details.

## Optional

- [Cart](/cart): Items selected for checkout.
- [Checkout](/checkout): M-PESA payment flow.
